title: Periderm
description:
A library plugin shared by *most* Naspen Grove projects. 
May the Periderm protect us all.
body:
*May the Periderm protect us all...*

A library required by *most* [Naspen Grove](https://github.com/theNaspenGrove) Paper plugins. It provides some of the utility classes used across the plugins for configuration and unified object management.
